tasks.name: Add product preview section to homepage content config

action.target: product preview section to homepage content config

tasks.purpose: Define configuration for product preview section (screenshot path, alt text, frame title) in centralized config file
tasks.input_state: homepage-content.config.ts exists with hero, sticky, features, testimonials, pricing, essentialReads sections but no productPreview section
tasks.output_state: productPreview configuration added to homepageContentConfig object with screenshot src, alt text, and frame title
tasks.acceptance_criterion: productPreview key exists in homepageContentConfig with src, alt, and title properties

tasks.name: Create browser frame component with glass styling and gradient border

action.target: browser frame component with glass styling and gradient border

tasks.purpose: Build reusable browser-style frame with macOS title bar (3 colored dots + title), glass card styling (backdrop-filter blur), rotating gradient border animation (@keyframes borderRotate), and glow effect pseudo-element

dependencies: I1.F3 glass card styling pattern (backdrop-filter blur, border, background opacity)
constraints: Accept children prop for screenshot content
Use CSS @keyframes borderRotate for gradient border animation
Implement glow effect via CSS pseudo-element with blur + accent color
Use design tokens from I1.F1 for colors (no hardcoded values)

tasks.input_state: home-browser-frame.tsx does not exist; I1 provides @keyframes borderRotate and glass card styling patterns
tasks.output_state: home-browser-frame.tsx exists with BrowserFrame component exporting children, className props; macOS title bar with 3 dots and title; gradient border animation; glass card styling; glow pseudo-element
tasks.acceptance_criterion: BrowserFrame component renders with macOS title bar (3 colored dots + centered title), glass card backdrop-filter blur, rotating gradient border using @keyframes borderRotate, and glow effect beneath frame
tasks.verification_command: ls apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/home-browser-frame.tsx && grep -q 'use client' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/home-browser-frame.tsx && grep -q 'BrowserFrame' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/home-browser-frame.tsx && grep -q 'prefers-reduced-motion' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/home-browser-frame.tsx && pnpm typecheck

dependencies.notes: Requires I1.F1 (design tokens/keyframes) and I1.F3 (glass card patterns) to be complete, but tracked at feature level

tasks.name: Create product preview section with AnimateOnScroll wrapper

action.target: product preview section with AnimateOnScroll wrapper

tasks.purpose: Build product preview section component that composes BrowserFrame with OptimizedImage (screenshot) and wraps in AnimateOnScroll for scroll-triggered fade-in entrance animation

constraints: Use existing OptimizedImage component for screenshot
Use AnimateOnScroll for scroll-triggered fade-in entrance
Load screenshot path and alt text from homepageContentConfig.productPreview
Use Next.js Image with AVIF/WEBP auto-format and blur placeholder

tasks.input_state: home-product-preview-section.tsx does not exist; BrowserFrame exists (T2); AnimateOnScroll exists (I1.F2.T4); homepageContentConfig.productPreview exists (T1)
tasks.output_state: home-product-preview-section.tsx exists with ProductPreviewSection component that renders BrowserFrame wrapping OptimizedImage, all wrapped in AnimateOnScroll for entrance animation
tasks.acceptance_criterion: ProductPreviewSection component renders BrowserFrame with product screenshot inside, wrapped in AnimateOnScroll for scroll-triggered fade-in; uses config from homepageContentConfig.productPreview
tasks.verification_command: ls apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/home-product-preview-section.tsx && grep -q 'use client' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/home-product-preview-section.tsx && grep -q 'ProductPreviewSection' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/home-product-preview-section.tsx && grep -q 'BrowserFrame' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/home-product-preview-section.tsx && grep -q 'AnimateOnScroll' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/home-product-preview-section.tsx && pnpm typecheck

dependencies.notes: Requires I1.F2.T4 (AnimateOnScroll) to be complete, but tracked at feature level

tasks.name: Replace ContainerScroll with ProductPreviewSection in page.tsx
tasks.purpose: Remove ContainerScroll block (lines 99-116) from homepage and replace with new ProductPreviewSection component, removing ContainerScroll import and adding ProductPreviewSection import

constraints: Maintain same vertical positioning (-mt-[15vh] sm:-mt-[20vh] lg:-mt-[25vh] relative z-[1])

tasks.input_state: page.tsx has ContainerScroll block at lines 99-116 with ContainerScroll import; ProductPreviewSection exists (T3)
tasks.output_state: ContainerScroll block replaced with <ProductPreviewSection />; ContainerScroll import removed; ProductPreviewSection import added; defaultHeroImage constant removed
tasks.acceptance_criterion: ContainerScroll no longer imported or used in page.tsx; ProductPreviewSection imported and rendered in place of ContainerScroll block; typecheck passes
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'ContainerScroll' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx | grep -q '^0$' && grep -q 'ProductPreviewSection' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx && ! grep -q 'defaultHeroImage' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck
